basic_details.job_title: Ordnance Factory Nalanda Graduate/Diploma Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Ordnance Factory Nalanda (OFN) Graduate/Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) Notification 2026 has been released on 01-07-2026 on the official website www.ofnashik.com. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced through the OFN Graduate/Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 30 years for General Candidates. Age relaxation for OBC-NCL (03 years), SC/ST (05 years).

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate (B.E./B.Tech) or Diploma in Chemical Engineering with Apprenticeship; B.Sc. Graduate with Chemistry as one of the major subjects with Apprenticeship.
qualification.details: Graduate (B. E./B. Tech.) in Chemical Engineering having Apprenticeship in the manufacturing/handling of ammunition and explosives. Diploma in Chemical Engineering having Apprenticeship in the manufacturing/handling of ammunition and explosives. B.Sc. Graduate with Chemistry as one of the major subjects and having Apprenticeship in the manufacturing/handling of ammunition and explosives. Graduate (B. E./B. Tech.) in Chemical Engineering having Apprenticeship in Chemical other than manufacturing/handling of ammunition and explosives. Diploma in Chemical Engineering having Apprenticeship in Chemical other than manufacturing/handling of ammunition and explosives.

salary_details.details: 1st year: Rs. 36,000/- 2nd year: Rs. 37,080/- 3rd year: Rs. 38,192/- 4th year: Rs. 39,338/- Plus IDA & HRA and other allowances as per existing Govt. order(s).

selection_process: Personal Interaction/Interview Document Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Ordnance Factory Nalanda Graduate/Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://munitionsindia.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Ordnance Factory Nalanda Graduate/Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Ordnance Factory Nalanda Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Ordnance Factory Nalanda Graduate/Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Ordnance Factory Nalanda Graduate/Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://munitionsindia.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Ordnance Factory Nalanda Graduate/Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Ordnance Factory Nalanda Graduate/Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Ordnance Factory Nalanda Graduate/Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) recruitment is 28th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Graduate/Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies available for the Graduate/Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) post at Ordnance Factory Nalanda.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Graduate (B.E./B.Tech) or Diploma in Chemical Engineering with relevant apprenticeship, or a B.Sc. Graduate with Chemistry as a major subject and relevant apprenticeship.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Graduate/Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for General candidates is 30 years, with relaxations applicable for OBC-NCL (03 years) and SC/ST (05 years).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 36,000/- in the first year to Rs. 39,338/- in the fourth year, along with IDA & HRA and other allowances.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the specified address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Graduate/Diploma Project Engineer (Chemical) role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Personal Interaction/Interview, Document Verification, and Medical Examination.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Ordnance Factory Nalanda located?
faq.answer: Ordnance Factory Nalanda is located in Rajgir, Bihar, with the pincode 803121.

faq.question: Q10. What is the duration of the contract for the Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: The engagement is on a tenure basis for a period of one year, extendable up to four years.
